hero.title: We Create Media Content That Suits Your Needs
hero.subtitle: From Big Projects to Small Productions
hero.description: In our media services, we guide companies through three main phases: detailed pre-production planning, efficient production with expert teams, and precise post-production to create a final product that not only looks great but also communicates effectively.

approach.title: Our Creative Approach
approach.description: We combine technical innovation with editorial excellence to deliver content that leaves a lasting impact. From concept to broadcast, we ensure the highest standards of quality and professionalism.

services.pageDescription: At Belqees Media, we offer a comprehensive range of services in media production, studio setup, technical consultancy, and training. With over six years of hands-on experience, we provide integrated solutions tailored to the needs of TV channels, production companies, and media organizations.
services.title: From Big Projects to Small Productions
services.description: In our media services, we guide companies through three main phases: detailed pre-production planning, efficient production with expert teams, and precise post-production

about.pageSubtitle: Belqees Media is a full-service media production company founded in 2015
about.title: BELQEES MEDIA

intro.title: About Company
intro.description: Founded in 2015, Belqees Media is a dynamic and forward-looking media production company providing high-quality services within and outside Turkey. With years of experience and a multi-national team, we blend creative, editorial, and technical expertise to support a diverse range of clients and media partners.
intro.services: We offer a wide range of services including live streaming, event coverage, studio setup, media production, and technical consultancy tailored for TV channels and organizations.

channel.title: Belqees Channel
channel.description: We operate Belqees Channel, a 24/7 satellite news station, supported by three fully-equipped studios, modern broadcasting technologies, and an integrated headquarters connecting all editorial and technical departments for a seamless production workflow.

systems.title: Our Broadcast & Media Systems
systems.description: We rely on sophisticated media systems to ensure a seamless, professional, and fully integrated workflow - from content creation to final broadcast.

octopus.title: Octopus Newsroom
octopus.description: A modern Newsroom Computer System (NRCS) that streamlines news planning, scriptwriting, and rundown management from the field to the broadcast.

metus.title: Metus MAM
metus.description: A media asset management and archiving solution used to efficiently organize, store, and retrieve video content across production teams.

brainstorm.title: Brainstorm 3D
brainstorm.description: Real-time 3D graphics and virtual studio solutions for dynamic and high-quality broadcast visuals.

adobe.title: Adobe Creative Cloud
adobe.description: A professional suite of tools for video editing, motion graphics, and design, used to produce high-end visual content.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide our work

innovativeEfficiency.title: Innovative Efficiency
innovativeEfficiency.description: We use the latest technologies and innovative methods to ensure high efficiency in every project

buildingConnections.title: Building Connections
buildingConnections.description: We believe in the power of long-term relationships with our clients and partners to achieve mutual success

forwardVision.title: Forward Vision
forwardVision.description: We always look to the future and prepare for upcoming challenges and opportunities in the media world

footer.description: Full-service media production company founded in 2015, dedicated to providing high-quality solutions for TV channels, digital platforms, and live events.
